_comment: Athenaeum single-file updater configuration. Edit the three values: host, live, files.
_comment_host: EXACT host name on the FileMaker Server SSL certificate. Not 'localhost' or an IP - the server only completes a TLS handshake for its certificate's name.
_comment_live: FileMaker Server live databases folder. Forward slashes are fine (normalized automatically); trailing slash optional.
_comment_files: Database file names to update, one per array entry, WITHOUT the .fmp12 extension. Must match the live file names (see list-databases.cmd). For a database in a Databases SUBFOLDER, include the subfolder with a forward slash, e.g. 'clips/athenaeum_clips'. Every listed file is migrated into the one downloaded athenaeum clone, so only list files that share the athenaeum schema.
